title: Compact Contract Answer
description: Envelope for compact contract answers returned by workspace query commands.

profile.description: Profile text value used by this contract.

surface.description: Surface text value used by this contract.

selector.description: Selector details used by this contract.

matched.description: Matched true/false policy flag used by this contract.

answer.description: The compact answer payload for the selected surface; shape is owned by the surface-specific contract.

items.description: One entry in the refs list.

refs.description: References that help interpret or verify this record.

target.description: Destination file, surface, package, or record referenced by this entry.
